title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses his approach to building successful startups. He emphasizes that competitive advantage comes from focus and avoiding building what others already do well, not from larger models or better pitch decks.
